title: PHP Laravel - Week 1 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 1 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to set up Laravel environments, directory structures, and routing rules.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel Artisan CLI
  • Project structures
  • Basic GET/POST routing
  • Controller groupings.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Basic Laravel Blog routing

Set up a Laravel project, define controllers, and link routing layouts.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Clean Laravel skeleton with custom routing configurations.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Thorough understanding of Laravel request cycles.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 2 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 2 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to master Blade templates engine, layout inclusions, and asset pipelines.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Blade layouts extends & section
  • Component syntax
  • Vite integration.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Sleek Landing Site in Laravel

Design a fully responsive website with shared header, footer, and section overrides using Blade.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Blade view files and layout directories.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to write modular, clean layouts using Blade.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 3 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 3 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to understand migrations, database tables schema design, and seeding models.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel migrations
  • Model seeders
  • Factory generators.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Database Schemas for Blog

Write migrations for users, posts, and tags. Seed database with test posts.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Database migration files and factory classes.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Expertise in database lifecycle management in Laravel.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 4 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 4 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to master database modeling using Eloquent ORM and relationship schemas.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Eloquent relationships (One-to-Many, Many-to-Many)
  • Eager loading relationships.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Category Post Database Associations

Develop relation hooks so a user can query posts by specific tags and authors.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Eloquent model classes and relations tests scripts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Capable of writing complex relational queries cleanly using Eloquent.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 5 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 5 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to develop forms processing and request data validation middleware.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel Request validation
  • CSRF protection
  • session error handling.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Validated Post Creation Form

Build forms in Blade that save blog post models, validating inputs and attachments.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Laravel request files and controller update hooks.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to handle safe user data inputs.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 6 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 6 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to implement authentication and user permissions using Laravel Breeze.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel Breeze authentication
  • Route authentication middlewares.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Authenticated User Portal

Configure register, login, and verify routes for custom portals.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Auth migrations and configured middleware checks.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Understanding secure session parameters and user authentication.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 7 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 7 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to create JSON REST APIs using Laravel API resources and routes.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • API resources in Laravel
  • API route controllers
  • stateless authentication headers.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: REST API for Products Catalog

Build stateless CRUD endpoints returning structured JSON data.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Laravel API controllers and Postman tests.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to design fast APIs returning structured data.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 8 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 8 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to secure REST APIs using Laravel Sanctum token scopes.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel Sanctum token auth
  • route-protection middlewares.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Mobile App API Authentication Server

Implement secure token generation on login and access scopes validation.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Sanctum auth middleware configurations and token tests.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Expertise in stateless token security methods.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 9 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 9 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to process file uploads and manage disk configurations.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel Filesystem disk driver
  • local/cloud file storage.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Profile Picture Storage Module

Integrate user avatar uploads, resizing files, and managing local/cloud disks.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Laravel storage controller and configuration files.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Proficiency in file processing pipelines.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 10 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 10 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to optimize Laravel applications with caching, queues, and database tuning.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel Cache driver
  • Redis integrations
  • Queues and background jobs.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Analytical Report Queue Processor

Set up queues to process heavy analytical reports in the background.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Laravel Job classes and Redis cache helpers.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to scale Laravel applications.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 11 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 11 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to write unit and feature test suites using PHPUnit/Pest.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel testing environment
  • database migrations resets
  • mock assertions.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Blogging Platform Feature Tests

Write tests validating authentication blocks, registration validation, and CRUD operations.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • PHPUnit/Pest test scripts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Confidence to launch tested, bug-free applications.

title: PHP Laravel - Week 12 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 12 (configured for a 12 weeks path) is to deploy Laravel projects to production cloud instances.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Laravel deployment commands
  • Nginx server configurations
  • AWS / digitalocean configs.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Launch Final Laravel App Live

Set up, configure, and launch the completed project live on a cloud server.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Live production API URL and final GitHub repository.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Mastery of production server management for Laravel.
